degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial public-helper review requested preserving empty public ObservationID and TraceID instead of generating helper IDs.
Initial lifecycle/export review requested parenting Session.StartRun children to the actual session observation rather than stale context parents.
Initial lifecycle/export review requested terminal export resilience when the start context is canceled before End or Error.
Updated helpers to retain only caller-supplied identity, derive session child defaults from the session handle, and store a non-canceling terminal export context.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
